entities.name: GOAT
entities.description: Domesticated animal used as an investment pathway for smallholder farmers in marginal areas

entities.name: MARARA DISTRICT
entities.description: A marginal and high-risk farming area in Central Mozambique

entities.name: CENTRAL MOZAMBIQUE
entities.description: The region in Mozambique where the study on goat market systems is conducted

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers with small-scale operations who use goats to enhance agricultural benefits

entities.name: GOAT VALUE CHAIN
entities.description: The sequence of activities and actors involved in the production and sale of goats

entities.name: FEIRA
entities.description: Informal goat sales venues used within the goat value chain

entities.name: INTERMEDIARIES
entities.description: Actors in the goat value chain who may be unscrupulous and hinder farmer development

entities.name: GOAT MARKETS
entities.description: Systems for the trade of goats, which currently face accessibility and productivity issues

entities.name: COMMUNITY-BASED GOAT MARKET SYSTEM
entities.description: A decentralized system for organizing goat markets to benefit farmers and manage risk

entities.name: FLOCK SIMULATIONS
entities.description: A simulation approach used to design and analyze modern goat market systems

entities.name: SOCIAL RESPONSIBILITY
entities.description: A community attribute fostered by a community-based goat market system

entities.name: RISK
entities.description: The high-risk nature of farming in marginal areas that needs management

entities.name: TECHNICAL CAPACITY
entities.description: The skills and knowledge required by communities to manage decentralized goat markets
